name: Autoresearch Task
description: Add new passing tests to increase tests_passed count beyond 274 (the previous maximum for autoresearch agent). Identify untested modules by running coverage analysis, then write minimal but valid unit tests for uncovered functions. Target modules that are straightforward to test (pure functions, data transformations) to safely add 5-15 new passing tests without risking existing ones.
